$doc: OpenCode delivery map. The guard is a plugin (tool.execute.before), not an exit-2 hook. Skills go to ~/.agents/skills (OpenCode reads it natively). opencode.json is merged. NOTE: OpenCode has no documented Stop-event hook, so the council Stop-nudge is NOT wired here — the council still runs via the skill + global AGENTS.md mandate.

links.note: Node resolves the symlink; plugin self-locates core/hooks/bash-guard.py
BIN for the council skill on OpenCode host

machineLocal.note: native=opencode --agent plan (host model) + external roster minus this host's model
